CS7.1 firmware Protocol V2 session-negotiation resources
baseline_fixture=test/fixtures/uno-resource-baseline.txt
foundation_fixture=test/fixtures/uno-v2-resource-spike.txt
environment=uno
build_flag=PROTOCOL_V2_ENABLED=0
flash_used_bytes=16800
flash_available_bytes=32256
static_sram_used_bytes=882
static_sram_available_bytes=2048
baseline_flash_delta_bytes=2554
baseline_static_sram_delta_bytes=62
measurement_command=pio run -e uno
v2_environment=uno_v2
v2_build_flag=PROTOCOL_V2_ENABLED=1
v2_flash_used_bytes=17740
v2_flash_available_bytes=32256
v2_static_sram_used_bytes=959
v2_static_sram_available_bytes=2048
baseline_v2_flash_delta_bytes=3494
baseline_v2_static_sram_delta_bytes=139
foundation_v2_flash_delta_bytes=970
foundation_v2_static_sram_delta_bytes=75
v2_over_default_flash_delta_bytes=940
v2_over_default_static_sram_delta_bytes=77
measurement_command_v2=pio run -e uno_v2
scope=V2-03 exact discovery, activation, session reset, and minimal protocol:1 return; CRC remains disabled.
